violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee putting on gloves without washing her hands first. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units throughout the kitchen were found dirty. Outer surfaces of cooking equipment were also found dirty. Shelving and equipment should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling vents and tiles, and flooring throughout the kitchen were found dirty. Floors and ceilings should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Freezer floor found with a gap that runs the length of the floor. Floor should be repaired so it is a smooth easily cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire shelving units in the walk-in cooler and metal shelving throughout the kitchen were found dirty. Door handle for the walk-in cooler with chicken was found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The walk-in cooler with chicken was found with walls buckled at the seams and flooring broken. Floors and walls should be maintained in good repair. Walk-in coolers and freezer floors were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
